name: The Open Account
specialty: An elite team of adaptable scouts, capable of navigating the treacherous rifts and the ever-changing Undercity, securing opportunities where others fear to tread.

members.name: Voris Keldon
members.note: A man with an uncanny ability to follow a scent, scarred from years of navigating the perilous rifts.

members.name: Thalia Thundershield
members.note: Her iron will and mastery of rune magic make her invaluable in the unpredictable Undercity.

members.name: Elysia Nightshade
members.note: Her silken voice and keen intellect make her a formidable negotiator in the treacherous world of the Undercity.

visual: Clad in leather armor and armed with an assortment of daggers, pistols, and wands, they move with a purposeful stride, their eyes always scanning the shadows for danger. A red 'O' symbol, marking them as 'The Open Account', is etched onto their chest plates.
reputation_note: Whispers echo through the Undercity of a crew that can get any job done, no questions asked, but always at a steep price.
